svg.text: ⚠ SCADA/ICS Security Architecture — Industrial Control Systems Defense-in-Depth

g.text: Signed firmware • Hardware modules • Physical access control
Unauthorized ladder logic changes • DoS via malformed packets
Buffer overflow exploits • Legacy protocol vulnerabilities
Rule: ALLOW Modbus-TCP:502 FROM PLC-subnet TO SCADA-subnet
DENY ANY FROM Enterprise TO Field-Devices
Protocol distribution: Modbus 45% | OPC-UA 30% | DNP3 15% | Other 10%
Splunk Enterprise | Elastic SIEM | IBM QRadar
Log ingestion: 45,000 EPS | Correlation rules: 2,500+ active
Palo Alto PA-5260 | Next-Gen FW | IPS/IDS | URL Filtering | SSL Decryption
SOAR: Splunk SOAR | Playbooks: 85+ automated response actions
✓ Incident response plan | ✓ Backup & recovery | ✓ Training
✓ Supply chain security | ✓ Vendor risk assessment | ✓ Pen testing
